description: Registry of all external Claude Code plugin sources endorsed or vendored by Roxabi. Source of truth for upstream URLs, sync state, and curation status. See CLAUDE.md ## External Ecosystem for full workflow documentation.

curated_marketplaces.name: identifier, kebab-case
curated_marketplaces.last_checked_commit: HEAD SHA at last CI check (HEAD — no branch tracking unless upstream_branch set)
curated_marketplaces.upstream_branch: (optional) branch to check instead of HEAD, e.g. main
curated_marketplaces.criteria_met: array: marketplace_json | install_mechanism | maintained_90d | quality_content | lt50pct_overlap

wrapped_plugins.upstream_url: .git URL for subtree strategy; repo URL for copy strategy
wrapped_plugins.upstream_path: subdirectory within repo (copy strategy only, e.g. skills/vercel-cli)
wrapped_plugins.last_sync_commit: SHA of upstream HEAD at last sync
wrapped_plugins.notes: free text — attribution, license, conflict notes

curated_marketplaces.name: agent-browser
curated_marketplaces.notes: Headless browser automation CLI for AI agents (Rust + Playwright). Ships agent-browser skill with snapshot-ref navigation, session management, auth, proxy, and video recording. Complements web-intel (scraping) — browser fills the interactive/auth gap.

curated_marketplaces.name: roxabi-vault
curated_marketplaces.notes: Roxabi-owned. Persistent memory for agents — SQLite+FTS5 knowledge base with CLI, library, and vault skills. Renamed roxabi-memory → roxabi-vault. 7 focused skills (v0.2.0).

curated_marketplaces.name: claude-plugins-official
curated_marketplaces.notes: Official Anthropic plugin marketplace. 83 plugins including LSPs, integrations (Supabase, Stripe, Vercel, GitHub, etc.), and workflow skills. Superset of claude-code-plugins (anthropics/claude-code).

curated_marketplaces.name: knowledge-work-plugins
curated_marketplaces.notes: Official Anthropic knowledge-work plugins — design, legal, marketing, product-management, sales, brand-voice. Non-engineering workflows.

curated_marketplaces.name: anthropic-agent-skills
curated_marketplaces.notes: Official Anthropic agent skills repository. Referenced in plugins-config.json but not yet installed locally.

curated_marketplaces.name: context7-marketplace
curated_marketplaces.notes: Upstash Context7 MCP server — up-to-date documentation lookup. Pulls version-specific docs and code examples from source repos into LLM context. 1 plugin (context7-plugin).

curated_marketplaces.name: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
curated_marketplaces.notes: Community. UI/UX design intelligence — 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stack guidelines. By nextlevelbuilder.

curated_marketplaces.name: visual-explainer
curated_marketplaces.notes: Community. Self-contained HTML diagrams, visualizations, data tables, slide decks. By nicobailon. Previously wrapped in plugins/ — upstream now ships proper marketplace.json.

curated_marketplaces.name: roxabi-forge
curated_marketplaces.notes: Roxabi-owned. Forge — HTML visual artifacts (diagrams, galleries, guides, epics). Extracted from roxabi-plugins. 1 plugin (forge) with 5 skills.

curated_marketplaces.name: roxabi-video-engine
curated_marketplaces.notes: Roxabi-owned. Programmatic video generation — 55 React components, 13 kits, headless MP4 rendering. 1 plugin (roxabi-video-engine) with 3 skills: generate, render, analyze.

curated_marketplaces.name: impeccable
curated_marketplaces.notes: Community. Design fluency — extends Anthropic's frontend-design skill with 7 domain refs (typography, OKLCH color, spatial, motion, interaction, responsive, UX writing), 18 steering commands (/audit, /critique, /polish, /distill, /animate, /typeset, etc.), curated anti-patterns, and standalone CLI (`npx impeccable detect`). Apache-2.0. By Paul Bakaus (paulbakaus.com). Plugin v2.1.1.

curated_marketplaces.name: mattpocock-skills
curated_marketplaces.notes: Community. Single Claude Code plugin (ships .claude-plugin/plugin.json, no marketplace.json). 14 skills across productivity (caveman, grill-me, handoff, write-a-skill) and engineering (diagnose, grill-with-docs, triage, improve-codebase-architecture, setup-matt-pocock-skills, tdd, to-issues, to-prd, zoom-out, prototype). MIT. By Matt Pocock. Promoted from wrapped 2026-05-20 — upstream now ships proper plugin.json; users get all 14 skills directly instead of our 5-skill curated subset.

curated_marketplaces.name: frontend-slides
curated_marketplaces.notes: Community. Zero-dependency HTML presentations with 12 visual themes, PPT conversion, Vercel deploy, PDF export. By zarazhangrui. Promoted from wrapped on 2026-05-05 — upstream now ships proper marketplace.json (v1.0.0).

curated_marketplaces.name: roxabi-live
curated_marketplaces.notes: Roxabi-owned. Hosts the relocated issue-triage plugin (labels + native relations, no Projects V2). Extracted from dev-core.

wrapped_plugins.notes: Removed from repo 2026-05-27. Pure upstream copy with no local content modifications; not worth sync overhead. Users can install from vercel-labs/agent-skills directly.
Removed from repo 2026-05-27. Pure upstream copy with no local content modifications; not worth sync overhead. Users can install from vercel-labs/agent-skills directly.
Removed from repo 2026-05-27. Pure upstream copy with no local content modifications; not worth sync overhead. Users can install from vercel-labs/agent-skills directly.
